e.p: Where do you want to visit first on the trip?
e.m: 1. Nói rõ địa điểm bạn chọn. 2. Nói một lý do ngắn cho lựa chọn đó.
e.h: Present Simple + because
e.s: I want to visit the old town. It is beautiful and I like the small streets.

e.p: How long will you stay at that place?
e.m: 1. Nói thời gian bạn sẽ ở đó. 2. Nói bạn sẽ làm gì trong thời gian đó.
e.h: Use will / going to + verb
e.s: I will stay for two hours. I am going to walk and take photos.

e.p: Do you prefer a guided tour or exploring alone?
e.m: 1. Chọn guided tour hoặc đi một mình. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn gọn.
e.h: Use prefer + -ing or 'I prefer' + noun
e.s: I prefer a guided tour because I will learn more history.

e.p: What time do you plan to leave the hotel?
e.m: 1. Nói giờ bạn dự định rời khách sạn. 2. Nói lý do liên quan thời gian (ví dụ: tránh nắng, kẹt xe).
e.h: Use Present Simple for schedule or will for decision
e.s: I will leave the hotel at 8 a.m. It will be better to avoid the heat.

e.p: Is there anything you must bring for that visit?
e.m: 1. Liệt kê một hoặc hai đồ bắt buộc. 2. Giải thích ngắn tại sao.
e.h: Use must / have to + verb
e.s: I must bring a water bottle and sunscreen. They will keep me hydrated and safe from the sun.

d.t: Mua vé và hỏi giờ mở cửa

e.p: What time does the museum open?
e.m: 1. Hỏi giờ mở cửa (đã có trong p). 2. Yêu cầu câu trả lời ngắn (giờ cụ thể).
e.h: Answer with Present Simple: It opens at + time
e.s: It opens at 9 a.m.

e.p: Can I buy a ticket online?
e.m: 1. Trả lời yes/no. 2. Nếu có, nói cách mua; nếu không, nói nơi mua.
e.h: Use can + verb or simple present
e.s: Yes, you can buy a ticket online on the museum website.

e.p: Is there a student discount?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có hoặc không. 2. Nêu mức giảm hoặc điều kiện ngắn gọn.
e.h: Use Present Simple + amount or condition
e.s: Yes, there is a student discount. It is 20% with a valid student card.

e.p: How long is the guided tour?
e.m: 1. Nói thời lượng tour. 2. Nói bạn có nên đặt trước không.
e.h: Use Present Simple and should for advice
e.s: The guided tour is one hour. You should book in advance.

e.p: Do you need to arrive early for entry?
e.m: 1. Nói cần hay không. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn (ví dụ: hàng dài, kiểm tra vé).
e.h: Use must/should + verb or will + reason
e.s: You should arrive early because there is often a long line.

d.t: Ở khách sạn gần điểm tham quan

e.p: Is breakfast included with the room?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nói loại ăn sáng ngắn nếu có.
e.h: Present Simple: Yes, it includes / No, it doesn't
e.s: Yes, breakfast is included. They serve toast and coffee.

e.p: Where is the nearest bus stop?
e.m: 1. Nói địa điểm gần nhất. 2. Nói mất bao lâu đi bộ tới đó.
e.h: Use There is/are + time + on foot
e.s: The nearest bus stop is on Main Street. It is five minutes on foot.

e.p: Can the hotel keep our luggage after checkout?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nêu thời gian tối đa nếu có.
e.h: Use can + verb and time phrase
e.s: Yes, the hotel can keep your luggage. They will store it until your evening flight.

e.p: We had a problem with the room heater last night.
e.m: 1. Xin lỗi ngắn (nhân vật khách sạn). 2. Nói đã làm gì để sửa hoặc đề xuất giải pháp.
e.h: Use Past Simple for problem and have to / will for solution
e.s: I'm sorry about that. We fixed the heater and you don't have to pay for a repair.

e.p: Could you recommend a quiet room for our stay?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nếu có, nêu vị trí phòng và lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use modal could/will and short explanation
e.s: Yes, I can put you in a room at the back. It is quieter than rooms near the street.

d.t: Mua quà lưu niệm tại điểm tham quan

e.p: How much is this postcard?
e.m: 1. Nói giá cụ thể. 2. Nói nếu có thể trả bằng thẻ hoặc tiền mặt.
e.h: Use It's + price and can/cannot for payment
e.s: It's two dollars. You can pay by cash or card.

e.p: Do you have a smaller size of this T-shirt?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nêu kích cỡ còn nếu có.
e.h: Use Present Simple: Yes, we have / No, we don't
e.s: Yes, we have a small size. It fits people who wear size S.

e.p: Can I try the hat on?
e.m: 1. Cho phép thử hay không. 2. Hướng dẫn ngắn nơi thử.
e.h: Use can + verb and there is/are for location
e.s: Yes, you can try it on. The mirror is near the door.

e.p: Is there a discount if I buy three items?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nêu % hoặc điều kiện ngắn nếu có.
e.h: Use Present Simple and numbers
e.s: Yes, there is a 10% discount if you buy three items.

e.p: I lost my receipt; can I return the souvenir?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không dựa trên chính sách. 2. Hướng dẫn ngắn về thủ tục trả hàng.
e.h: Use modal must / can and past simple if needed
e.s: You can return it without the receipt if the item is unworn. Please bring the product to the counter.

d.t: Thời tiết và trang phục khi tham quan

e.p: Is it going to rain today?
e.m: 1. Trả lời dựa trên dự báo. 2. Nói bạn sẽ mặc gì nếu mưa.
e.h: Use going to for future + will for decision
e.s: Yes, it is going to rain this afternoon. I will bring a raincoat.

e.p: The weather was sunny yesterday at the beach.
e.m: 1. Kể ngắn về thời tiết đã xảy ra. 2. Nói bạn đã làm gì vì trời nắng.
e.h: Use Past Simple + so/because for consequence
e.s: It was sunny yesterday. We walked on the beach and swam in the sea.

e.p: Should I wear comfortable shoes for the tour?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn gọn.
e.h: Use should / shouldn't + verb
e.s: Yes, you should wear comfortable shoes because you will walk a lot.

e.p: Compare a rainy day and a sunny day for sightseeing.
e.m: 1. Nêu 1 lợi thế của ngày nắng. 2. Nêu 1 lợi thế của ngày mưa.
e.h: Use comparatives (more/adj-er + than) or simple sentences
e.s: A sunny day is better for photos. A rainy day is quieter and less crowded.

e.p: I think the mountain will be cold tomorrow morning.
e.m: 1. Đồng ý hoặc không. 2. Đưa lời khuyên về trang phục.
e.h: Use must/should + verb for advice
e.s: I agree, it will be cold. You should wear a warm jacket and a hat.

d.t: Ăn uống ở chỗ tham quan

e.p: Do you want to eat at the café or the restaurant?
e.m: 1. Chọn một nơi. 2. Nói lý do ngắn (giá, nhanh, view).
e.h: Use prefer / want + to + verb
e.s: I want to eat at the café because it is cheaper and faster.

e.p: Is there a vegetarian option on the menu?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nói tên một món nếu có.
e.h: Use Present Simple and name a dish
e.s: Yes, there is a vegetarian pasta. It is popular and tasty.

e.p: Could we have the bill, please?
e.m: 1. Phản hồi ngắn (đồng ý). 2. Nói sẽ làm gì tiếp theo (đưa bill, tính tiền).
e.h: Use will / can for offering service
e.s: Certainly, I'll bring the bill now. You can pay by card or cash.

e.p: I ate local food and I liked it very much.
e.m: 1. Nói món bạn đã ăn. 2. Nêu lý do bạn thích (vị, tươi, giá).
e.h: Use Past Simple + because
e.s: I ate grilled fish at the market. It tasted fresh and was cheap.

e.p: Do you recommend a cheap but good place to eat near here?
e.m: 1. Đề xuất một nơi ngắn. 2. Nêu lý do (giá/chuẩn/bữa ăn).
e.h: Use recommend + because / It is + adjective
e.s: I recommend the small noodle shop on River Street because the food is tasty and less expensive.

e.p: How do we get to the museum from here?
e.m: 1. Nói phương tiện chính. 2. Nói thời gian hoặc khoảng cách ngắn.
e.h: Use take + transport / It is + time/distance
e.s: We can take bus number 5. It takes about twenty minutes.

e.p: Is a taxi faster than the bus now?
e.m: 1. So sánh taxi và bus. 2. Nói lý do ngắn (kẹt xe, tuyến thẳng).
e.h: Use comparatives: faster / more comfortable than
e.s: A taxi is faster than the bus now because the bus stops often.

e.p: I missed the last train yesterday.
e.m: 1. Kể chuyện ngắn về việc lỡ tàu. 2. Nói bạn đã làm gì sau đó.
e.h: Use Past Simple + then
e.s: I missed the last train yesterday. Then I took a taxi to the hotel.

e.p: Should we buy a day pass for public transport?
e.m: 1. Trả lời nên hay không. 2. Nêu lợi ích ngắn nếu nên.
e.h: Use should / shouldn't + reason
e.s: Yes, you should buy a day pass because it is cheaper for many trips.

e.p: Can you show me the bus schedule on your phone?
e.m: 1. Đồng ý hoặc từ chối ngắn. 2. Nêu thông tin quan trọng trên bảng (ví dụ: giờ cuối).
e.h: Use can + verb and Present Simple for facts
e.s: Yes, I can show it. The last bus is at 10 p.m.

d.t: Chụp ảnh và lưu giữ kỷ niệm

e.p: Can you take a photo of us here?
e.m: 1. Đồng ý/không. 2. Nếu đồng ý, nêu cách bạn sẽ chụp (close/zoom).
e.h: Use can + verb and will for action
e.s: Yes, I can take a photo. I will use the wide angle to include the building.

e.p: Where is a good spot for sunset photos?
e.m: 1. Nêu một địa điểm cụ thể. 2. Nói giờ tốt để chụp (sunset time).
e.h: Use Present Simple + time phrase
e.s: The hill above the port is a good spot. Sunset is around 6 p.m. today.

e.p: I took many photos but my phone ran out of battery.
e.m: 1. Kể điều đã xảy ra (pin hết). 2. Nói bạn đã làm gì tiếp theo.
e.h: Use Past Simple and then + past simple
e.s: My phone ran out of battery. Then I bought a power bank at the market.

e.p: Should I post these photos on social media now?
e.m: 1. Đứng ở vị trí đồng ý/khuyên không. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn (kết nối, chờ chọn lọc).
e.h: Use should / shouldn't + reason
e.s: You should wait and choose the best ones. It will look better to post later.

e.p: Do you prefer printed photos or digital albums?
e.m: 1. Chọn một loại. 2. Nêu một lý do ngắn cho lựa chọn.
e.h: Use prefer + noun and because
e.s: I prefer digital albums because they are easier to share and take less space.

d.t: Giải quyết sự cố: mất đồ hoặc lạc đường

e.p: I can't find my backpack. Where should I check first?
e.m: 1. Gợi ý một nơi để kiểm tra. 2. Nói bước tiếp theo nếu không tìm thấy.
e.h: Use should / could + verb and then + verb
e.s: Check at the information desk first. If you don't find it there, you should report it to lost and found.

e.p: I think I left my phone in the taxi last night.
e.m: 1. Nói việc bạn nên làm ngay. 2. Nói thông tin cần cung cấp (ví dụ: time, route).
e.h: Use must / have to + verb and time/address words
e.s: You must call the taxi company now. Give them the time and the route of your ride.

e.p: I'm lost; I don't know how to get back to the hotel.
e.m: 1. Nói nơi bạn đang đứng (ví dụ: near a landmark). 2. Hỏi ý dẫn đường ngắn hoặc nhờ taxi.
e.h: Use Present Simple for location and can you + verb for request
e.s: I'm near the big fountain at Central Square. Can you tell me the way back or call a taxi?

e.p: Someone found my camera and wants to return it.
e.m: 1. Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để nhận lại. 2. Nêu yêu cầu an toàn ngắn (ví dụ: check ID).
e.h: Use will / can and should for safety
e.s: I will meet them at the information desk to collect it. They should show an ID before handing it over.

e.p: What if my passport was stolen during the trip?
e.m: 1. Nói bước đầu bạn phải làm. 2. Nói nơi cần liên hệ tiếp theo.
e.h: Use must + verb and contact + place
e.s: You must report the theft to the police immediately. Then contact your embassy for help.

d.t: So sánh hai điểm du lịch

e.p: Which is better for families: the beach or the mountain?
e.m: 1. Chọn một nơi. 2. Nêu 1-2 lý do ngắn phù hợp cho gia đình.
e.h: Use comparatives and because
e.s: The beach is better for families because children can swim and play on the sand.

e.p: The city is busier but has more museums than the town.
e.m: 1. Nhắc lại ý so sánh ngắn. 2. Nêu sở thích của bạn trong ngữ cảnh đó.
e.h: Use but / more + noun than and I prefer / I like
e.s: Yes, the city is busier but has more museums than the town. I prefer the city because I enjoy museums.

e.p: Which place is less expensive to stay overnight?
e.m: 1. Chọn nơi ít tốn kém hơn. 2. Nêu ví dụ chi phí ngắn (giá phòng hoặc ăn uống).
e.h: Use less + adjective or cheaper than + example
e.s: The town is less expensive to stay overnight. Rooms there are usually cheaper than in the city.

e.p: Compare safety between a crowded market and a quiet street.
e.m: 1. Nói nơi nào an toàn hơn. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn (pickpocket, lighting).
e.h: Use comparative + because
e.s: A quiet street can be safer at night because it has good lighting. A crowded market can be risky for pickpockets.

e.p: If you had one day, which place would you visit and why?
e.m: 1. Chọn một địa điểm. 2. Giải thích ngắn sử dụng so sánh nếu có.
e.h: Use would + verb and comparative if needed
e.s: I would visit the city because it has more attractions to see in one day.

d.t: Lên lịch cho một ngày tham quan

e.p: What is your first activity in the morning?
e.m: 1. Nói hoạt động buổi sáng đầu tiên. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn (ví dụ: tránh nắng, nổi bật buổi sáng).
e.h: Use will / going to + verb or Present Simple for routine
e.s: First, I will visit the morning market. It is lively and fresh in the morning.

e.p: How will you move between attractions during the day?
e.m: 1. Nói phương tiện chính. 2. Nói thời gian dự kiến cho di chuyển.
e.h: Use will take / will go by + transport
e.s: We will go by bus between attractions. Each trip will take about thirty minutes.

e.p: When will you have lunch?
e.m: 1. Nêu thời gian ăn trưa. 2. Nói bạn sẽ ăn ở đâu (ví dụ: local restaurant).
e.h: Use will + time phrase and place
e.s: We will have lunch at 1 p.m. at a local restaurant near the square.

e.p: If the museum is closed, what is the backup plan?
e.m: 1. Đưa một kế hoạch thay thế. 2. Nêu lý do chọn phương án đó.
e.h: Use will + verb for plan and because
e.s: If the museum is closed, we will visit the botanical garden instead because it is nearby and open.

e.p: Summarize the day's plan in two sentences.
e.m: 1. Nói hoạt động chính buổi sáng và trưa. 2. Nói hoạt động chính buổi chiều và kết thúc ngày.
e.h: Use simple past/future forms and connectors (and, then)
e.s: In the morning we will visit the market and walk in the old town. In the afternoon we will go to the museum and finish the day at the waterfront.

d.t: Đề xuất và phản hồi gợi ý hành trình

e.p: I suggest we visit the temple first and then the park.
e.m: 1. Đồng ý hoặc nêu phản đối ngắn. 2. Nếu phản đối, đề xuất một thay thế.
e.h: Use I agree / I don't agree + because and suggest
e.s: I agree with that plan because the temple is less crowded in the morning.

e.p: Would you like to add a food market to the route?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nếu có, nói thời gian thích hợp để đến.
e.h: Use would like / yes/no and time phrase
e.s: Yes, I'd like to add the food market at noon for lunch and snacks.

e.p: I think the museum is too far and we will waste time.
e.m: 1. Đồng ý hoặc không. 2. Đưa gợi ý tối ưu hóa thời gian ngắn.
e.h: Use but / so and should for advice
e.s: I agree it may take a long time, so we should skip it or visit a closer gallery.

e.p: Can we shorten the walking route for older people?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nêu cách bạn sẽ thay đổi lộ trình để ngắn hơn.
e.h: Use can + verb and use shorter / more comfortable than
e.s: Yes, we can shorten it by using a taxi between distant spots. This is more comfortable than long walks.

e.p: Give two quick tips to make the trip better for everyone.
e.m: 1. Nói tip 1 ngắn (ví dụ: mang nước). 2. Nói tip 2 ngắn (ví dụ: mua vé trước).
e.h: Use imperatives or should + verb
e.s: Bring a water bottle and wear comfortable shoes. Buy tickets online to save time.

d.t: Ôn tập: Một ngày tham quan hoàn chỉnh

e.p: What will you do first when you arrive at the city?
e.m: 1. Nói hoạt động đầu tiên. 2. Nói lý do ngắn để bắt đầu như vậy.
e.h: Use will + verb and because
e.s: I will check in at the hotel and drop my luggage. It will be easier to walk without bags.

e.p: How much time do you plan for the main attraction?
e.m: 1. Nói thời lượng cho điểm chính. 2. Nói một hoạt động cụ thể bạn sẽ làm ở đó.
e.h: Use will + time and then + verb
e.s: I will spend two hours at the main attraction. Then I will join the guided tour.

e.p: If it gets rainy, what change will you make to the plan?
e.m: 1. Nói một thay đổi cụ thể. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn cho thay đổi đó.
e.h: Use will + verb and because
e.s: I will visit indoor museums instead because they are dry and interesting.

e.p: Summarize transport and meal plans for the day.
e.m: 1. Nói phương tiện chính dùng trong ngày. 2. Nói nơi và giờ ăn chính.
e.h: Use present simple and time phrases
e.s: We will use buses and walk between nearby spots. We will have lunch at 1 p.m. at a local café.

e.p: Do you think this plan is better than staying in one place all day?
e.m: 1. Chọn better/worse. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn sử dụng so sánh.
e.h: Use comparatives (better than) and because
e.s: Yes, this plan is better than staying in one place because we can see more and learn different things.

d.t: Ôn tập: Xử lý sự cố khi đi tham quan

e.p: I lost my wallet; what should I do first?
e.m: 1. Nói hành động đầu tiên cần làm. 2. Nói nơi nên báo loss.
e.h: Use must / should + verb and contact + place
e.s: You should cancel your cards immediately. Then report the loss at the police station.

e.p: My child is missing in the crowd.
e.m: 1. Nói bước khẩn cấp bạn sẽ làm. 2. Nói nơi gặp lại ngắn (ví dụ: information desk).
e.h: Use will / must and there is/are
e.s: I will ask security for help at once. Meet at the information desk if you get separated.

e.p: A shop sold me a broken item last night.
e.m: 1. Nói việc bạn đã làm hoặc nên làm. 2. Nêu yêu cầu đòi lại tiền hoặc đổi hàng.
e.h: Use Past Simple and should/can for requests
e.s: I returned to the shop and explained the problem. They should give a refund or replace the item.

e.p: Someone scratched my car in the parking lot.
e.m: 1. Nói hành động đầu tiên (ghi hình, báo cáo). 2. Nói nơi liên hệ tiếp theo (police/insurance).
e.h: Use must + verb and contact + noun
e.s: You must take photos of the damage and report it. Then contact your insurance company.

e.p: If you feel sick during the trip, what will you do?
e.m: 1. Nói bước bạn sẽ làm ngay. 2. Nói nơi bạn sẽ tìm giúp đỡ.
e.h: Use will + verb and go to / contact
e.s: I will rest and drink water first. If I don't feel better, I will go to a local clinic.

d.t: Ôn tập: So sánh địa điểm và đưa lời khuyên

e.p: Which is more relaxing: a quiet village or a busy city square?
e.m: 1. Chọn nơi thư giãn hơn. 2. Nêu 1 lý do ngắn sử dụng so sánh.
e.h: Use comparative (more + adj + than) and because
e.s: A quiet village is more relaxing than a busy city square because it is less noisy.

e.p: Is it better to book tickets early or arrive early on the day?
e.m: 1. Chọn một phương án. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn cho lựa chọn đó.
e.h: Use should / better to + verb and because
e.s: It is better to book tickets early because you will avoid long lines and sold-out shows.

e.p: Give two pieces of advice for first-time visitors.
e.m: 1. Tip 1 ngắn (ví dụ: mang nước). 2. Tip 2 ngắn (ví dụ: mua vé trước).
e.h: Use imperatives or should + verb
e.s: Bring comfortable shoes and carry a water bottle. Buy tickets online to save time.

e.p: Compare visiting in peak season and off-season.
e.m: 1. Nói 1 lợi ích của peak season. 2. Nói 1 lợi ích của off-season.
e.h: Use comparatives or simple sentences with because
e.s: Peak season has more events and activity. Off-season is cheaper and less crowded.

e.p: If a friend asks for advice between two tours, what would you suggest?
e.m: 1. Chọn tour bạn đề xuất. 2. Nêu 1 lý do ngắn cho đề xuất đó.
e.h: Use would + verb and because
e.s: I would suggest the shorter walking tour because it is more relaxed and shows the highlights.
